journeys.rationale: A first-time promote of a reviewed manifest reconciles the live sandbox to it — the happy path through the human-gated bridge.

seed_files.izba.yml:
apiVersion: izba.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Sandbox
metadata:
  name: gate-demo
spec:
  image: ubuntu:24.04
  resources: {cpus: 2, memory: 2Gi}
  rootDisk: {size: 8Gi}
  egress:
    enforce: true
    allow:
      - host: github.com

steps.intent: create a sandbox from the manifest in the current directory
steps.expect: the sandbox is created and running

steps.intent: review the pending changes between the manifest and the live sandbox
steps.expect: a structured diff and a review token are shown

steps.intent: apply the reviewed manifest to the sandbox
steps.expect: the changes are promoted and the sandbox reflects the manifest

journeys.rationale: Editing izba.yml after reviewing it invalidates the review token; promote must refuse (the TOCTOU guard the review gate exists to enforce).

seed_files.izba.yml:
apiVersion: izba.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Sandbox
metadata:
  name: gate-demo
spec:
  image: ubuntu:24.04
  resources: {cpus: 2, memory: 2Gi}
  rootDisk: {size: 8Gi}
  egress:
    enforce: true
    allow:
      - host: github.com

steps.intent: create a sandbox from the manifest
review the diff to obtain a review token for the current manifest
steps.expect: a review token is shown for the current izba.yml

steps.intent: edit izba.yml to broaden the egress allow-list, then try to promote relying on the earlier review
steps.expect: promote refuses because the manifest changed since it was reviewed
